5.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Should use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Should use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers. It should be replaced with 'fgets'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it can cause buffer overflow. More critically, many modern compilers (like GCC with default settings) will refuse to compile code using 'gets', leading to a compilation error.]
